Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Computer-generated dream world: Virtual reality for a 286 processor 126 upvotes, 18 comments
  2. Show HN: Timber – Ollama for classical ML models, 336x faster than Python 157 upvotes, 28 comments
  3. Neocaml – Rubocop Creator's New OCaml Mode for Emacs 49 upvotes, 6 comments
  4. Right-sizes LLM models to your system's RAM, CPU, and GPU 202 upvotes, 43 comments
  5. An interactive intro to Elliptic Curve Cryptography 71 upvotes, 12 comments
  6. AMD Am386 released March 2, 1991 18 upvotes, 1 comments
  7. Inside the M4 Apple Neural Engine, Part 1: Reverse Engineering 28 upvotes, 3 comments
  8. Everett shuts down Flock camera network after judge rules footage public record 338 upvotes, 100 comments
  9. Mondrian Entered the Public Domain. The Estate Disagrees 97 upvotes, 24 comments
  10. Motorola announces a partnership with GrapheneOS Foundation 1096 upvotes, 382 comments
  11. Show HN: Web Audio Studio – A Visual Debugger for Web Audio API Graphs 15 upvotes, 1 comments
  12. Microsoft bans the word "Microslop" on its Discord, then locks the server 382 upvotes, 139 comments
  13. Microslop Manifesto 163 upvotes, 54 comments
  14. Show HN: Omni – Open-source workplace search and chat, built on Postgres 85 upvotes, 26 comments
  15. Ghostty – Terminal Emulator 800 upvotes, 334 comments
  16. Jolla phone – a full-stack European alternative 252 upvotes, 96 comments
  17. How to record and retrieve anything you've ever had to look up twice 102 upvotes, 35 comments
  18. Making Video Games in 2025 (without an engine) 252 upvotes, 106 comments
  19. Go-Native Durable Execution 23 upvotes, 5 comments
  20. Enable CORS for Your Blog 76 upvotes, 30 comments
  21. WebMCP is available for early preview 333 upvotes, 182 comments
  22. Tove Jansson's criticized illustrations of The Hobbit (2023) 200 upvotes, 109 comments
  23. /e/OS is a complete "deGoogled", mobile ecosystem 355 upvotes, 207 comments
  24. Process-Based Concurrency: Why Beam and OTP Keep Being Right 69 upvotes, 34 comments
  25. U.S. science agency moves to restrict foreign scientists from its labs 172 upvotes, 109 comments
  26. Libxml2 Enterprise Edition (AGPL, from the previous maintainer) 16 upvotes, 7 comments
  27. If AI writes code, should the session be part of the commit? 350 upvotes, 313 comments
  28. Squidcasa/midipipe: ALSA Sequencer to plain text and back 4 upvotes, 1 comments
  29. How to talk to anyone and why you should 227 upvotes, 368 comments
  30. OpenClaw Surpasses React to Become the Most-Starred Software Project on GitHub 7 upvotes, 6 comments

Last generated 10:30pm, 2 March 2026. Source here.
